query:
SELECT id, name, phone, roles, category 
FROM users 
WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND deletedAt IS NULL 
LIMIT 20;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT id, name, phone, roles, category 
FROM users 
WHERE roles LIKE '%teacher%' AND deletedAt IS NULL 
LIMIT 20;
